title: Megastone Craftable
description: This pack implements a crafting recipe for Mega Showdown's Megastones
body:
# Mega Showdown's Megastones crafting

**Version:** 1.0  
**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1

**Dependencies:** [Cobblemon Mega Shodown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)

**Author:** Antre des loutres 

---

## Description
This datapack allows players to obtain Megastones from Mega Showdowns in Survival mode. With the huge number of Megas available and the rarity of these gems, it was extremely difficult to obtain them all.

---

## Features
- Makes Pokémon Mega Evolution stones easier to obtain, while still requiring players to find their corresponding Key Stones in caves.
- Easy to install and remove.

---

## Installation
1. Download the datapack `.zip`.  
2. Place the fils in your world’s `datapacks` directory:
